title: Ras Tanura Heat Wave
lead: Ras Tanura is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.34. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Ras Tanura are characterized by high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 14.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 37%, and the wind speed is 25.8 km/h, which can exacerbate the heat wave's impact. 
 The absence of Heating Degree Days (HDD) indicates that the temperature is consistently high, with no relief in sight.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical heat wave in Ras Tanura.
